description: List the fracture attributes. By default, the DFNs are listed along with their associated templates (if any) and fracture count.

keywords.name: attribute
keywords.description: List fracture attributes. If no s is given, then the available attributes are listed. If s is specified, then the value of that attribute is listed for each fracture.

keywords.name: extra
keywords.description: List the fracture extra variables at index i .

keywords.name: group
keywords.description: List the fracture group names at slot s .

keywords.name: position
keywords.description: List the positions (center) of all fractures.

keywords.name: property
keywords.description: List fracture properties. If no s is given, then the available properties are listed for each fracture. If s is specified, then the value of that property is listed for each fracture. Fracture properties can be used with the fracture contact-model command to set contact model properties.
